logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1016] The critical path in module 'Conv2D_HW_Pipeline_loop_acc_x' consists of the following: 'load' operation ('cx_load', src/conv2d.cpp:62) on local variable 'cx' [68] (0 ns) 'icmp' operation ('icmp_ln62', src/conv2d.cpp:62) [82] (2.47 ns) 'select' operation ('select_ln60_5', src/conv2d.cpp:60) [83] (0.993 ns) 'or' operation ('or_ln58_1', src/conv2d.cpp:58) [87] (0 ns) 'select' operation ('select_ln58', src/conv2d.cpp:58) [88] (0.978 ns) 'add' operation ('add_ln62', src/conv2d.cpp:62) [144] (2.55 ns) 'store' operation ('cx_write_ln62', src/conv2d.cpp:62) of variable 'add_ln62', src/conv2d.cpp:62 on local variable 'cx' [151] (1.59 ns)
Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1016 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1016.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-871] Estimated clock period (8.584ns) exceeds the target (target clock period: 10ns, clock uncertainty: 2.7ns, effective delay budget: 7.3ns). Resolution: For help on HLS 200-871 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-871.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'loop_filters' (src/conv2d.cpp:39:31) in function 'Conv2D_HW' more than one sub loop. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'loop_convolve_y' (src/conv2d.cpp:56:41) in function 'Conv2D_HW' the outer loop is not a perfect loop because there is nontrivial logic in the loop latch.
